response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web development, DevOps tooling, and open-source GIS platforms, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical workshops
Experience with low-latency systems and performance-critical DLang applications
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep learning optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware performance experience
